title.en: France survive Paraguay's 'disgraceful' and 'embarrassing' dark arts
title.zh-CN: 法国在巴拉圭的“可耻”和“尴尬”的黑魔法中幸存下来

summary.en: After dismantling all before them at this World Cup, France had to find a new way to win against a Paraguay side whose use of the dark arts angered many of those watching.
summary.zh-CN: 在本届世界杯上拆除了他们面前的所有人之后，法国不得不寻找一种新的方式来战胜巴拉圭方面，巴拉圭方面使用黑魔法激怒了许多观众。

title.en: France overcome resolute Paraguay to reach quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 法国战胜坚定的巴拉圭，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: World Cup favourites France book their quarter-final place thanks to Kylian Mbappe's second-half penalty against a stubborn Paraguay side in Philadelphia.
summary.zh-CN: 由于Kylian Mbappe对费城顽固的巴拉圭队的下半场点球，世界杯最受欢迎的法国队进入了四分之一决赛。

title.en: Mexico could bring the best out of  Tuchel's England
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥可以充分利用图赫尔的英格兰

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards feel the way Mexico play could bring out the best of Thomas Tuchel's England side.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育世界杯专家托马斯·希茨尔斯佩格（ Thomas Hitzlsperger ）、乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）认为，墨西哥队的比赛方式可以发挥托马斯·图

title.en: Mbappé and France ditch ‘tuxedos’ to play ‘dirty football’ and beat Paraguay
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩和法国抛弃“燕尾服”踢“肮脏的足球”并击败巴拉圭

summary.en: On this occasion, France kept the champagne football on ice. Which was probably just as well, given the temperature. As Philadelphia broiled in an Independence Day heatwave, the World Cup favourites...
summary.zh-CN: 在这个场合，法国将香槟足球放在冰上。考虑到温度，这可能也很好。随着费城在独立日热浪中炙手可热，世界杯最受欢迎的……

title.en: ‘Here to write our own chapters’: England not daunted by unique occasion of Mexico game, says Tuchel
title.zh-CN: “在这里写下我们自己的篇章” ： Tuchel说，英格兰没有被墨西哥比赛的独特场合吓倒

summary.en: ‘Impossible’ to adapt to altitude but players coping, says coach Aguirre trying to keep El Tri ‘grounded’ before Azteca matchThomas Tuchel has admitted England are enduring a challenging adaptation...
summary.zh-CN: 教练Aguirre说， “不可能”适应海拔高度，但球员们正在应对，他试图在阿兹特克比赛之前让El Tri “接地”托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）承认英格兰正在经历一个具有挑战性的适应……

title.en: England braced for a Mexican whirlwind as Tuchel strives for calm amid the chaos
title.zh-CN: 图切尔在混乱中努力保持冷静，英格兰迎接墨西哥旋风

summary.en: After their frantic display against DR Congo, England head coach needs his side to remain composed in the Azteca cauldronIt was somehow in keeping with the bedlam that has gripped Mexico since...
summary.zh-CN: 在对阵刚果民主共和国的疯狂比赛之后，英格兰主教练需要他的球队在阿兹特克大锅中保持镇定。这在某种程度上与自从……以来一直困扰着墨西哥的喧嚣保持一致。

title.en: French football chief condemns Chilavert’s remarks that Les Bleus are ‘a squad from Africa’
title.zh-CN: 法国足球酋长谴责奇拉维特关于莱斯布鲁斯是“来自非洲的球队”的言论

summary.en: Philippe Diallo: former goalkeeper has ‘fallen into disgrace’Remarks came in run-up to France v Paruguay matchThe French football federation president, Philippe Diallo, has condemned José Luis...
summary.zh-CN: 菲利普·迪亚洛（ Philippe Diallo ） ：前守门员“陷入耻辱”在法国对阵巴拉圭的比赛中发表讲话法国足球联合会主席菲利普·迪亚洛（ Philippe Diallo ）谴责何塞·路易斯（ José Luis ） ……

title.en: France find a way past Paraguay and what awaits England in Mexico? - World Cup Daily
title.zh-CN: 法国找到了超越巴拉圭的道路，在墨西哥等待英格兰的是什么？ -世界杯日报

summary.en: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning, Archie Rhind-Tutt, Barney Ronay and Philippe Auclair as France beat a spiky Paraguay side to reach the quarter-finalsRate, review, share on Apple Podcasts...
summary.zh-CN: 巴里·格兰登宁（ Barry Glendenning ）、阿奇·林德-塔特（ Archie Rhind-Tutt ）、巴尼·罗内（ Barney Ronay ）和菲利普·奥克莱尔（ Philippe Auclair ）与马克斯·拉什登（ Max Rushden ）一起，法国击败巴拉圭队，进入四分之一决赛在苹果播

title.en: Why England won't fear Mexico or the Azteca - Shearer
title.zh-CN: 为什么英格兰不会害怕墨西哥或阿兹特克- Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why Thomas Tuchel's team will not be worried about the difficult conditions when they play Mexico at the Azteca Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的球队在阿兹特克体育场（ Azteca Stadium ）与墨西哥队比赛时不会担心

title.en: James doubtful for Mexico tie but Quansah fit again
title.zh-CN: 詹姆斯对墨西哥领带持怀疑态度，但Quansah再次适应

summary.en: Reece James misses training on the eve of England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico but Jarell Quansah is available again.
summary.zh-CN: 里斯·詹姆斯错过了英格兰世界杯16强对阵墨西哥前夕的训练，但贾雷尔·昆萨（ Jarell Quansah ）再次上场。

title.en: Lightning, hotel security and spying - issues England face in Mexico
title.zh-CN: 闪电、酒店安全和间谍活动--英格兰在墨西哥面临的问题

summary.en: England are booed as they arrive at their Mexico City hotel to prepare for their World Cup last-16 game against Mexico - and it's not the only issue they face.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在抵达墨西哥城酒店为世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的比赛做准备时受到嘘声-这不是他们面临的唯一问题。

title.en: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
title.zh-CN: 让英格兰世界杯比赛陷入混乱的五个半小时

summary.en: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport explains how a story of confusion and anger - culminating...
summary.zh-CN: 在周五的几个小时里，似乎没有人知道英格兰世界杯最后16场对阵墨西哥的联合主办方的比赛何时开始。BBC Sport解释了一个关于困惑和愤怒的故事--最终如何……

title.en: 'Disgusting' Paraguay went 'way too far' against France
title.zh-CN: “令人作呕”的巴拉圭对法国“走得太远”

summary.en: BBC pundits Thomas Hitzlsperger, Joe Hart and Micah Richards discuss Paraguay's attempts to get under France's skin at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司的专家托马斯·希茨尔斯佩格（ Thomas Hitzlsperger ）、乔·哈特（ Joe Hart ）和米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）讨论了巴拉圭在2026年世界杯

title.en: Morocco reach quarter-finals as co-hosts Canada knocked out
title.zh-CN: 摩洛哥进入四分之一决赛，房屋管家加拿大淘汰出局

summary.en: Canada become the first of co-hosts to exit the 2026 World Cup, after being beaten 3-0 by Morocco in Houston.
summary.zh-CN: 在休斯顿被摩洛哥以3比0击败后，加拿大成为第一个退出2026年世界杯的联合主办国。

title.en: Ounahi gives Morocco the lead against Canada
title.zh-CN: Ounahi让摩洛哥在对阵加拿大的比赛中领先

summary.en: Azzedine Ounahi scores the opener for Morocco against Canada in the last 32 of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: Azzedine Ounahi在2026年世界杯的最后32场比赛中为摩洛哥对阵加拿大的比赛打进了揭幕战。

title.en: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget

summary.en: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's second-smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.
